sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106168" key="u(ba/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑβάζω</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῡ]</pron>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ὑβός</etym>) <sense id="n106168.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">stoop forward and vomit,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
